thnx for downloading!!!

note: these don't have the full animation sets for use in the elements generator, so the idea is that you can paste them on top of some walking sprites.

Should be fine for most NPCs or for rpgmaker games that don't use the extended animation sheets.

I'll likely revisit these with the full Elements animations to include in a future expansion pack. 

For now these are a special release for patreon. I hope these are useful for your project!


NOTE:  I have these sets exported so you can paste them in easily onto the exported elements sheets, that are arranged like this: { Alignment Preview.png included}

I figured this make sense because if you are using a different-sized sheet, these are still aligned to the 16x16 grid so it should be quick if you need to edit them on your end. 

For example: if you're not using the Elements alignment offset, you can easily crop the bottom "tile" off of each row.

---

Thanks!
